title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3.3, Phi-4, Gemma 2, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama’s REST API—chat, generate, embed, pull, list models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers; same API surface as the Python client.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: First-party LangChain integration—chat, embeddings, tool-calling with any Ollama-hosted model.

title: ollama-webui (formerly ollama-ui)
summary: Feature-rich web GUI for Ollama—multi-user, RAG, presets, dark mode, Docker one-liner.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Interactive REPL and CLI wrapper around the Ollama REST API with history, syntax highlighting, and piping.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Turn any Ollama model into a GitHub Copilot replacement for VS Code—inline suggestions and chat.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU autoscaling and PVC support.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Lightweight RAG template using Ollama embeddings + Chroma + Streamlit; drop in docs and chat.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-host Discord bot that brings any Ollama model to your server with slash commands and thread support.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama—sync/async, fluent API, Android compatible (Maven Central).

title: ollama-express
summary: Express.js starter that exposes OpenAI-compatible endpoints backed by Ollama for drop-in replacement.

title: ollama-terraform
summary: Terraform module to provision GPU-enabled AWS EC2 or GCP instances with Ollama server pre-installed.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack 2.0 integration—use Ollama models as generators or embedders in Haystack pipelines.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack bot that answers questions using any Ollama model; supports threads, app mentions, and file snippets.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET 8 client library for Ollama with async streaming, dependency-injection friendly (NuGet: Ollama).

title: ollama-rust
summary: Community Rust crate providing typed async bindings to the Ollama REST API (crates.io: ollama-rs).

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger pipeline example that containerizes and tests Ollama models in CI without GPU hosts.

title: ollama-go
summary: Unofficial Go client for Ollama with generated structs and streaming support (go get github.com/jmorganca/ollama-go).

title: ollama-models
summary: Community-curated collection of ready-to-use Modelfiles for code, chat, function-calling, and multilingual models.
